active_ingredients.name: Dinotefuran
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Systemic neonicotinoid absorbed through leaves and translocated in plant sap, disrupts nicotinic acetylcholine receptors causing feeding stop and death in sucking pests

active_ingredients.name: Bifenthrin
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Contact and stomach pyrethroid that affects sodium channels of insect nerve cells causing rapid paralysis and knockdown

mode_of_action_summary: Dual action insecticide providing instant knockdown through Bifenthrin and long systemic control of sucking pests through Dinotefuran.
farmer_symptoms: سفید مکھی دا بہت حملہ اے
ٹیلہ پتے توں رس چوس رہیا اے
مہو پتے دے تھلے بیٹھا اے
تھرپس کارن پتیاں چاندی ورگیاں ہو گئیاں نیں
پتیاں مڑ کے سکڑ رہیاں نیں
رس چوسن والے کیڑے بہت ودھ گئے نیں
نرم سنڈی شروع ہو گئی اے

application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform spray on upper and lower leaf surface

crop_stage_recommendation: Vegetative to flowering stage (avoid during active flowering)
tank_mix_compatibility: Jar test recommended before new tank mix

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Safe for crops at recommended dose
crop_safety.overdose_effect: Leaf burn or temporary crop stress

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Rotate with insecticides of different mode of action in next sprays

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place

farmer_benefits: Long systemic control of sucking pests
Reduces repeat sprays when used at right timing

frequently_asked_questions.question: Mister kadon spray kariye?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Jadon sucking keere shuru hon lagan te fasal active growth vich hove.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Eh whitefly te kam karda ae?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Haan, eh safed makhi, jassid, aphid te thrips nu bohat vadhiya control karda ae.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Per acre dose kinni ae?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: 60–100 ml per acre 100–120 litre pani vich mila ke.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Ki eh vaddi sundi te kam karda ae?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Nahi, eh chhoti sundi te early stage layi zyada effective ae.

llm_usage_hint: Recommend at early sucking pest infestation for fast knockdown and systemic control. Do not recommend for large larval rescue or during active flowering.

master_descriptions.english: Mister is a dual action systemic and contact insecticide that provides rapid knockdown and long-lasting control of sucking pests in cotton, vegetables and rice.
master_descriptions.urdu: مسٹر ایک ڈوئل ایکشن سسٹمک اور کانٹیکٹ کیڑا مار دوا ہے جو کپاس، سبزیوں اور چاول میں رس چوسنے والے کیڑوں کو فوری اور دیرپا کنٹرول فراہم کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: مسٹر اک ڈوئل ایکشن سسٹمک تے کانٹیکٹ کیڑا مار اے جو کپاس، سبزیاں تے دھان وچ رس چوسن والے کیڑیاں نوں فوری تے لمے ٹائم تک کنٹرول کردا اے۔
